name: Great Central Mortgage Acceptance Co., LTD
description_short: Texas-based hard money lender specializing in equity-based loans for commercial real estate purchases, refinances, and fix-and-flip projects with same-day approvals and closings in 5-10 days.
description_long:
Texas Equity Lending has operated as a direct equity-based lender in San Antonio, Texas since 1993, giving it over 30 years of experience in the hard money lending space. The company focuses on borrowers whose financing needs fall outside traditional bank lending parameters, particularly real estate investors and commercial borrowers seeking quick capital deployment.

The company offers hard money loans ranging from $100,000 to $3,000,000 for commercial purchases, refinances, and property rehabilitation projects. Their lending philosophy emphasizes equity position over credit scores and income documentation. They advertise same-day conditional approvals, fast in-house underwriting, and typical closing timelines of 5-10 days. The company also explicitly protects mortgage brokers who refer business to them.

Distinguishing factors include their emphasis on equity-based underwriting rather than traditional credit metrics, elimination of minimum FICO score and income requirements, competitive short-term and long-term rate options, and their stated commitment to fast turnaround times. Customer testimonials highlight responsiveness, professionalism, and efficiency. The company positions itself as a lending partner for real estate investors conducting multiple transactions.

As a hard money lender, this company operates in a higher-cost financing segment with faster approval and funding timelines than traditional mortgages. Borrowers should expect rates and terms typical of private equity lending rather than conventional financing. The company's legitimacy is supported by its long operating history, though borrowers should independently verify current licensing and regulatory compliance.
pros: Same-day conditional loan approvals with fast in-house underwriting
Loans up to $3,000,000 with no minimum credit score or income documentation requirements
Typical closings completed in 5-10 days, significantly faster than traditional mortgages
Equity-based underwriting allows approval for borrowers traditional banks reject
30+ years of operating history in Texas hard money lending since 1993
Broker protection program explicitly mentioned for mortgage professionals
Both short-term and long-term competitive rate options available
cons: Hard money loans typically carry higher interest rates and fees than traditional mortgages
Minimum loan amount of $100,000 excludes smaller borrowers
Limited to Texas geography (based in San Antonio)
Equity-based lending requires significant property value; not suitable for low-equity situations
Website contains no information about specific rates, terms, or fee structures
best_for: Real estate investors conducting fix-and-flip projects needing quick capital deployment
Commercial property buyers with strong equity positions but imperfect credit histories
Borrowers in time-sensitive situations requiring 5-10 day closings
Mortgage brokers referring hard money lending clients in Texas
diagnosis: This company is best for real estate investors and commercial borrowers with significant property equity who need expedited funding outside traditional bank parameters. Primary caveat: hard money lending involves substantially higher costs than conventional mortgages; borrowers should verify current rate/fee structures and ensure equity position supports the loan before applying.
services: Hard money loans for commercial real estate purchases
Broker referral program with broker protection
